query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_appliance (
    id                         INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id                     BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    uuid                       CHAR(36)     NOT NULL,
    hostname                   VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    platform                   VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
    firmware_version           VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    license_status             VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    license_platform           VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT NULL,
    licensed_features          JSON         NOT NULL,
    licensed_modules           JSON         NOT NULL,
    enabled_integrations       JSON         NOT NULL,
    product_modules            JSON         NOT NULL,
    status_message             VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    connection_type            VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'direct',
    manages_local              BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    managed_by_local           BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    data_access                BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    fingerprint                VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL,
    total_capacity             INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    advanced_analysis_capacity INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    add_time                   BIGINT       DEFAULT NULL,
    sync_time                  BIGINT       NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    analysis_levels_managed    BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    nickname                   VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    display_name               VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    polled_at                  DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    UNIQUE KEY uk_appliance_uuid (uuid),
    KEY fk_appliance_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_appliance_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_network (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    node_id         INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    appliance_uuid  VARCHAR(36)  NOT NULL,
    name            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    description     TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    idle            BOOLEAN      NOT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY fk_network_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_network_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_device (
    id                          INT            NOT NULL,
    raw_id                      BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    extrahop_id                 VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    discovery_id                VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    display_name                VARCHAR(255)   NOT NULL,
    default_name                VARCHAR(255)   NOT NULL,
    custom_name                 VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    description                 TEXT           DEFAULT NULL,
    macaddr                     CHAR(17)       NOT NULL,
    ipaddr4                     VARCHAR(15)    DEFAULT NULL,
    ipaddr6                     VARCHAR(45)    DEFAULT NULL,
    device_class                VARCHAR(20)    NOT NULL,
    vendor                      VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    is_l3                       BOOLEAN        NOT NULL,
    vlanid                      INT            NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    parent_id                   INT            DEFAULT NULL,
    node_id                     INT            DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time                    BIGINT         NOT NULL,
    user_mod_time               BIGINT         NOT NULL,
    discover_time               BIGINT         NOT NULL,
    last_seen_time              BIGINT         DEFAULT NULL,
    auto_role                   VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    role                        VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    analysis_level              TINYINT        NOT NULL,
    analysis                    VARCHAR(20)    NOT NULL,
    on_watchlist                BOOLEAN        NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    critical                    BOOLEAN        NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    custom_criticality          VARCHAR(50)    DEFAULT NULL,
    model                       VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    model_override              VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    custom_make                 VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    custom_model                VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    custom_type                 VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    cdp_name                    VARCHAR(255)   NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    dhcp_name                   VARCHAR(255)   NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    netbios_name                VARCHAR(255)   NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    dns_name                    VARCHAR(255)   NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    cloud_instance_id           VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    cloud_instance_type         VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    cloud_instance_description  TEXT           DEFAULT NULL,
    cloud_instance_name         VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    cloud_account               VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    vpc_id                      VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    subnet_id                   VARCHAR(255)   DEFAULT NULL,
    polled_at                   DATETIME(3)    NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY idx_device_macaddr (macaddr),
    KEY idx_device_ipaddr4 (ipaddr4),
    KEY idx_device_role (role),
    KEY idx_device_last_seen (last_seen_time),
    KEY idx_device_discover_time (discover_time),
    KEY fk_device_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_device_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

    id                          INT            NOT NULL,
    raw_id                      BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    extrahop_id                 VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    discovery_id                VARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    display_name                VARCHAR(255)   NOT NULL,
    default_name                VARCHAR(255)   NOT NULL,
